zh.lifeSummary: 當Manuel Laskaris於大約1140年出生在土耳其布爾薩時，他的父親Prince Of Misia Konstantine Laskaris28歲，母親Princess Maria Komnena35歲。他於大約1168年與Ioanna Karatzaina在土耳其布爾薩易茲尼可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1221年11月享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Manuel Laskaris于大约1140年出生在土耳其布爾薩时，他的父亲Prince Of Misia Konstantine Laskaris28岁，母亲Princess Maria Komnena35岁。他于大约1168年与Ioanna Karatzaina在土耳其布爾薩易茲尼可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1221年11月享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Laskaris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Demetrios, Dimitrios, Panos.
Greek: occupational name from a Hellenized form of Persian lashkarī ‘soldier’.

variants.name: Laskos
meanings: nickname for a work-weary person, from laskos, from Italian lasco ‘loose’, Sicilian dialect lascu ‘sluggish, work-weary, miserable’.
from the personal name Laskos, a pet form of the name Laskaris (see Laskaris ). Compare Lasko 4.

nameMeanings.name: Manuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Manuel Laskaris was born about 1140, in Bursa, Türkiye, his father, Prince Of Misia Konstantine Laskaris, was 28 and his mother, Princess Maria Komnena, was 35. He married Ioanna Karatzaina about 1168, in İznik, Bursa, Türkiye. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in November 1221, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Manuel Laskaris est né environ 1140, à Bursa, Turquie, son père, Prince Of Misia Konstantine Laskaris, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Princess Maria Komnena, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Ioanna Karatzaina environ 1168, à İznik, Bursa, Turquie. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en novembre 1221, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Manuel Laskaris um 1140 in Bursa, Türkei geboren wurde, war sein Vater Prince Of Misia Konstantine Laskaris 28 und seine Mutter Princess Maria Komnena 35. Er hat um 1168 in İznik, Bursa, Türkei Ioanna Karatzaina geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb im November 1221 im Alter von 82 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Manuel Laskaris è nato il circa 1140 nel Bursa, Turchia, il suo padre, Prince Of Misia Konstantine Laskaris, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Princess Maria Komnena, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Ioanna Karatzaina circa 1168, nel İznik, Bursa, Turchia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel novembre 1221, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Manuel Laskarisが約1140年にトルコブルサで生まれた時，父Prince Of Misia Konstantine Laskarisは28歳，母Princess Maria Komnenaは35歳であった。約1168年にトルコブルサイズニクでIoanna Karatzainaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1221年11月に82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Manuel Laskaris(이)가 대략 1140년 튀르키예 버사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Prince Of Misia Konstantine Laskaris(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Princess Maria Komnena(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1168년 튀르키예 버사 이즈닉에서 Ioanna Karatzaina(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1221년 11월 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Manuel Laskaris nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Bursa, Turquia, seu pai, Prince Of Misia Konstantine Laskaris, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Princess Maria Komnena, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Ioanna Karatzaina aproximadamente 1168, em İznik, Bursa, Turquia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em novembro de 1221, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Manuel Laskaris родился около 1140 г. в местности бурса, Турция, его отцу по имени Prince Of Misia Konstantine Laskaris было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Maria Komnena, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Ioanna Karatzaina около 1168 г. в местности изник, бурса, Турция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер ноябрь 1221 г. в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Manuel Laskaris nació aproximadamente 1140, en Bursa, Turquía, su papá, Prince Of Misia Konstantine Laskaris, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Princess Maria Komnena, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Ioanna Karatzaina aproximadamente 1168, en İznik, Bursa, Turquía. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en noviembre de 1221, a la edad de 82 años.
